description.para: Register offsets from the base address of an RFDC ADC and DAC device.

briefdescription.para: ADC Fabric Rate (or OBS) Register TDD Selected.
ADC Fabric Register (or OBS) TDD Selected.
ADC Fabric Debug (or OBS) Register TDD Selected.
ADC Obs FIFO Latency Control Register.
ADC FIFO Latency Control (or OBS) Register TDD Selected.
ADC Decimation Config (or OBS) Register TDD Selected.
ADC Decimation mode (or OBS) Register TDD Selected.
ADC I channel mixer config Register.
ADC Q channel mixer config Register.
ADC Front end Data Control Register.
ADC Time Interleaved digital correction block gain control0 Register.
ADC Time Interleaved digital correction block gain control1 Register.
ADC Time Interleaved digital correction block gain control2 Register.
ADC Time Interleaved digital correction block gain control3 Register.
ADC Time skew correction control bits0 Register.
Static Configuration data for DAC Analog.
ADC Time skew correction control bits1 Register.
ADC Time skew correction control bits2 Register.
ADC Time skew correction control bits3 Register.
ADC Time skew correction control bits4 Register.
ADC Time skew correction control bits5 Register (Gen 3 only)
ADC Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch0 Register(Below Gen 3)
ADC Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch1 Register.
ADC Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch2 Register.
ADC Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch3 Register.
ADC Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch0 Register.
ADC Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch1 Register.
ADC Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch2 Register.
ADC Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch3 Register.
DAC variable output power control Register.
subadc0, sub-drp address of target Register
subadc0, sub-drp data of target Register
subadc1, sub-drp address of target Register
subadc1, sub-drp data of target Register
subadc2, sub-drp address of target Register
subadc2, sub-drp data of target Register
subadc3, sub-drp address of target Register
subadc3, sub-drp data of target Register
ADC Static configuration bits for ADC(RX) analog Register.
ADC/DAC Static configuration bits for ADC/DAC analog Register.
ADC/DAC Static configuration bits for ADC/DAC analog Register.
ADC/DAC Static configuration bits for ADC/DAC analog Register.
DAC Static configuration bits for DAC analog Register.
ADC RX Pair static Configuration Register.
ADC RX Pair static Configuration Register.
ADC FIFO Latency measurement LSB Register.
ADC FIFO Latency measurement MSB Register.
ADC Signal Detector Threshold 0 on Counter.
ADC Signal Detector Threshold 0 off Counter.
PLL bits for coltage controlled oscillator LSB.
PLL bits for coltage controlled oscillator MSB.
PLL bits for coarse frequency control LSB.
PLL bits for coarse frequency control MSB.
PLL bits for loop filters LSB.
PLL bits for loop filters MSB.
Clock network control and trim register.
Multi-tile sync and clock source control register.
Clock Network Register Mask for IntraTile.
PLL Reference Divider Register Mask for IntraTile.
PLL Output Divider Register Mask for IntraTile.
PLL Output Divider Register Mask for IntraTile.
PLL Output Divider Register Mask for IntraTile.
Background time skew correction block (below Gen 3)
Background time skew correction block (below Gen 3)
Background time skew correction block (below Gen 3)
Background time skew correction block (below Gen 3)
Background time skew correction block (below Gen 3)
Background time skew correction block (below Gen 3)
Background time skew correction block (below Gen 3)
Background time skew correction block (below Gen 3)
FIFO Start register tommon along tile.
FIFO Obs Start register common along tile.
FIFO Start (or OBS) register common along tile TDD Selected.

description.para: Register offsets from the base address of the IP.

briefdescription.para: The tiles enabled in the design.
The ADC analogue/digital paths enabled in the design.
The DAC analogue/digital paths enabled in the design.
A shift to get to the correct tile for the path.

description.para: This register contains bits for the current tile State.
This register contains bits for calibration modes for ADC.

sectiondef.header: Calibration Coefficients - Calibration coefficients and disable registers

description.para: This register contains bits for calibration coefficients for ADC.

briefdescription.para: gain coeff mask for IP Gen 2 or below
time skew coeff override enable mask

sectiondef.header: FIFO Enable - FIFO enable and disable register

description.para: This register contains bits for FIFO enable and disable for ADC and DAC.

sectiondef.header: Clock Enable - FIFO Latency, fabric, DataPath,

description.para: full-rate, output register
This register contains bits for various clock enable options of the ADC. Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Enable for FIFO Latency measurement clock.

sectiondef.header: Debug reset - FIFO Latency, fabric, DataPath,

description.para: full-rate, output register
This register contains bits for various Debug reset options of the ADC. Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Reset subadc-drp register on clock cal.
Reset FIFO Latency measurement clock domain.

sectiondef.header: Fabric rate - Fabric data rate for read and write

description.para: This register contains bits for read and write fabric data rate for ADC.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: ADC FIFO Write Number of Words per clock.
DAC FIFO Write Number of Words per clock.
ADC FIFO Read Number of Words per clock.
DAC FIFO Read Number of Words per clock.

description.para: This register contains bits of Fabric Offset.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: FIFO read pointer offset for interface de-skew.

sectiondef.header: Fabric ISR - Interrupt status register for FIFO interface

description.para: This register contains bits of margin-indicator and user-data overlap (overflow/underflow).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: User-data overlap- data written faster than read (overflow)
User-data overlap- data read faster than written (underflow)

sectiondef.header: Fabric IMR - Interrupt mask register for FIFO interface

description.para: This register contains bits of margin-indicator and user-data overlap (overflow/underflow).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: User-data overlap- data written faster than read (overflow)
User-data overlap- data read faster than written (underflow)

sectiondef.header: Update Dynamic - Trigger a dynamic update event

description.para: This register contains bits of update event for slice, nco, qmc and coarse delay.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a slice update event apply to _DCONFIG reg.
Trigger a update event apply to NCO_DCONFIG reg.
Trigger a update event apply to QMC_DCONFIG reg.
ADC Trigger a update event apply to Coarse delay_DCONFIG reg.
DAC Trigger a update event apply to Coarse delay_DCONFIG reg.

sectiondef.header: FIFO Latency control - Config registers for FIFO Latency measurement

description.para: This register contains bits of FIFO Latency ctrl for disable, restart and set fifo latency measurement.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: Decode ISR - ISR for Decoder Interface

description.para: This register contains bits of subadc 0,1,2 and 3 decoder overflow and underflow range.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: Decode IMR - IMR for Decoder Interface

description.para: This register contains bits of subadc 0,1,2 and 3 decoder overflow and underflow range.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: DataPath (DAC)- FIFO Latency, Image Reject Filter, Mode,

description.para: This register contains bits for DataPath latency, Image Reject Filter and the Mode for the DAC.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: DataPath ISR - ISR for Data Path interface

description.para: This register contains bits of QMC Gain/Phase overflow, offset overflow, Decimation I-Path and Interpolation Q-Path overflow for stages 0,1,2.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: DataPath IMR - IMR for Data Path interface

description.para: This register contains bits of QMC Gain/Phase overflow, offset overflow, Decimation I-Path and Interpolation Q-Path overflow for stages 0,1,2.
Inverse sinc overflow, Datapath Scaling, Interpolation I and Q, IMR, and Even Nyquist Zone overflow Mixer I and Q over/underflow. Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Over or under flow mixer (Mixer half I)
Over or under flow mixer (Mixer half Q)

sectiondef.header: FIFO IMR - FIFO for Data Path interface

description.para: This register contains bits of FIFO over/underflows Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to configure the decimation in terms of the type of data.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: ChannelA (2GSPS real data from Mixer I output)
ChannelB (2GSPS real data from Mixer Q output)
4GSPS may be I or Q or Real depending on high level block config

description.para: This register contains bits to configures the decimation rate.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: Mixer config0 - Configure I channel coarse mixer mode of operation

description.para: This register contains bits to set the output data sequence of I channel.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Output data word[0] of I channel.
Output data word[1] of I channel.
Output data word[2] of I channel.
Output data word[3] of I channel.

sectiondef.header: Mixer config1 - Configure Q channel coarse mixer mode of operation

description.para: This register contains bits to set the output data sequence of Q channel.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Output data word[0] of Q channel.
Output data word[1] of Q channel.
Output data word[2] of Q channel.
Output data word[3] of Q channel.

sectiondef.header: Mixer mode - Configure mixer mode of operation

description.para: This register contains bits to set NCO phases, NCO output scale and fine mixer multipliers.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Enable fine mixer multipliers on IQ i/p for I output.
Enable fine mixer multipliers on IQ i/p for Q output.
Select NCO phases for I output.
Select NCO phases for Q output.
Select NCO phases for I output.
Select NCO phases for Q output.

description.para: This register contains bits to Select event source, delay and reset delay.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: NCO event source selection is Group.
NCO event source selection is slice.
NCO event source selection is tile.
NCO event source selection is Sysref.
NCO event source selection is Marker.
NCO event source selection is fabric.
delay in clk_dp cycles in application of event after arrival
optional delay on the NCO phase reset delay

sectiondef.header: NCO Phase Reset - NCO Slice Phase Reset

description.para: This register contains bits to reset the nco phase of the current slice phase accumulator.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Reset NCO Phase of current slice.

description.para: This register contains bits for DAC interpolation data type

sectiondef.header: NCO Freq Word[47:32] - NCO Phase increment(nco freq 48-bit)

description.para: This register contains bits for frequency control word of the NCO.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: NCO Freq Word[31:16] - NCO Phase increment(nco freq 48-bit)

description.para: This register contains bits for frequency control word of the NCO.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: NCO Freq Word[15:0] - NCO Phase increment(nco freq 48-bit)

description.para: This register contains bits for frequency control word of the NCO.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: NCO Phase Offset[17:16] - NCO Phase offset

description.para: This register contains bits to set NCO Phase offset(18-bit offset added to the phase accumulator).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: NCO Phase Offset[15:0] - NCO Phase offset

description.para: This register contains bits to set NCO Phase offset(18-bit offset added to the phase accumulator).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: NCO Phase mode - NCO Control setting mode

description.para: This register contains bits to set NCO mode of operation.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to Select event source and delay.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: QMC event source selection is group.
QMC event source selection is slice.
QMC event source selection is tile.
QMC event source selection is Sysref.
QMC event source selection is Marker.
QMC event source selection is fabric.
delay in clk_dp cycles in application of event after arrival

description.para: This register contains bits to enable QMC gain and QMC Phase correction.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to set QMC offset correction factor.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: QMC offset correction factor sign bit.

description.para: This register contains bits to set QMC gain correction factor.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to set QMC phase correction factor.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: QMC phase correction factor sign bit.

sectiondef.header: Coarse Delay Update - Coarse delay update mode.

description.para: This register contains bits to Select event source and delay.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Coarse delay event source selection mask.
Coarse delay event source selection is group.
Coarse delay event source selection is slice.
Coarse delay event source selection is tile.
Coarse delay event source selection is sysref.
Coarse delay event source selection is Marker.
Coarse delay event source selection is fabric.
delay in clk_dp cycles in application of event after arrival

sectiondef.header: Coarse delay Config - Coarse delay select

description.para: This register contains bits to select coarse delay.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

sectiondef.header: Data Scaling Config - Data Scaling enable

description.para: This register contains bits to enable data scaling.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to control crossbar switch that select data to mixer block.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Control crossbar switch that select the data to mixer block mux1.
Control crossbar switch that select the data to mixer block mux0.
Control crossbar switch that select the data to QMC.
Control crossbar switch that select the data to decimation filter.

description.para: This register contains bits to select mode, clear mode and to clear sticky bit.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select Threshold0 under averaging.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select Threshold0 under averaging.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select Threshold0 under threshold.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select Threshold0 over threshold.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select mode, clear mode and to clear sticky bit.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select Threshold1 under averaging.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select Threshold1 under averaging.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select Threshold1 under threshold.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to select Threshold1 over threshold.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits to manage the TDD Control

briefdescription.para: The TDD control bit for Mode 0 config.
The TDD control bit for Mode 1 config (unused)
The IP RTS disable bit for the observation channel.
The TDD control bit for Mode 1 config (unused)
The IP RTS disable bit for the observation channel.

description.para: This register contains bits to select raw data and cal coefficient to be streamed to memory.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: raw data and cal coefficient to be streamed to memory

description.para: This register contains bits for Time Interleaved digital correction block gain and offset correction.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: TI DCB gain and offset correction.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time Interleaved digital correction block gain and offset correction.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: TI DCB gain and offset correction.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time Interleaved digital correction block gain and offset correction.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: TI DCB gain and offset correction.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time skew correction control bits0(enables, mode, multiplier factors, debug).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Constant mu_cm multiplying common mode path.
Programmable delay on dither path to match data path.
Constant mu_cm multiplying common mode path.
Programmable delay on dither path to match data path.

description.para: This register contains bits for enable/disable shadow logic , Nyquist zone selection, enable full speed clock, Programmable delay.
This register contains bits for Time skew correction control bits1 (Deadzone Parameters).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits for Time skew correction control bits2 (Filter parameters).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits for Time skew control settling time following code update.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits for Time skew control setting time following code update.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains bits for Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch0.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Code to correction DAC of subadc ch0 front end switch0.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch1.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Code to correction DAC of subadc ch1 front end switch0.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch2.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Code to correction DAC of subadc ch2 front end switch0.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch3.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Code to correction DAC of subadc ch3 front end switch0.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch0.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Code to correction DAC of subadc ch0 front end switch1.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch1.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Code to correction DAC of subadc ch1 front end switch1.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch2.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Code to correction DAC of subadc ch2 front end switch1.

description.para: This register contains bits for Time skew DAC cal code of subadc ch3.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: Code to correction DAC of subadc ch3 front end switch1.

description.para: This register contains the sub-drp address of the target register.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the sub-drp data of the target register.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: sub-drp0 data for read or write transaction

description.para: This register contains the sub-drp address of the target register.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the sub-drp data of the target register.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: sub-drp1 data for read or write transaction

description.para: This register contains the sub-drp address of the target register.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the sub-drp data of the target register.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: sub-drp2 data for read or write transaction

description.para: This register contains the sub-drp address of the target register.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the sub-drp data of the target register.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: sub-drp3 data for read or write transaction

description.para: This register contains the static configuration bits of ADC(RX) analog.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the static configuration bits of ADC(RX) analog.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the static configuration bits of ADC(RX) analog.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the static configuration bits of ADC(RX) analog.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the RX Pair (RX0 and RX1 or RX2 and RX3)static configuration bits of ADC(RX) analog.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the RX Pair (RX0 and RX1 or RX2 and RX3)static configuration bits of ADC(RX) analog.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the subadc ch0 ocb1 BG offset correction factor value.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the subadc ch0 ocb2 FG offset correction factor value(read and write).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the subadc ch1 ocb1 BG offset correction factor value.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the subadc ch1 ocb2 FG offset correction factor value(read and write).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the subadc ch2 ocb1 BG offset correction factor value.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the subadc ch2 ocb2 FG offset correction factor value(read and write).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the subadc ch3 ocb1 BG offset correction factor value.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the subadc ch3 ocb2 FG offset correction factor value(read and write).
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains the DCB status.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: read the status of gcb acc0 msb bits(subadc chan0)

description.para: This register contains the DCB Status.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: read the status of gcb acc0 lsb bits(subadc chan0)

description.para: This register contains the DCB status.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: read the status of gcb acc1 msb bits(subadc chan1)

description.para: This register contains the DCB Status.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: read the status of gcb acc1 lsb bits(subadc chan1)

description.para: This register contains the DCB status.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: read the status of gcb acc2 msb bits(subadc chan2)

description.para: This register contains the DCB Status.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: read the status of gcb acc2 lsb bits(subadc chan2)

description.para: This register contains the DCB status.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: read the status of gcb acc3 msb bits(subadc chan3)

description.para: This register contains the DCB Status.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.

briefdescription.para: read the status of gcb acc3 lsb bits(subadc chan3)

description.para: This register contains the bits for Reference Clock Divider
This register contains bits for result, key and done flag.
Read/Write apart from the reserved bits.
This register contains Unary Decoder/Randomizer settings to use.
This register contains HSCOM_PWR to check powerup_state.
This register contains Interpolation filter modes.
This register contains the bits that indicate whether or not a tile is enabled (Read Only).

briefdescription.para: Shift to the DAC tile bits.

description.para: This register contains the bits that indicate whether or not an analogue/digital is enabled (Read Only).

briefdescription.para: Shift to the digital path bits.

description.para: This register contains Tile reset bit.
This register contains common status bits.
This register contains Start and End state bits.
This register contains Start and End state bits.
This register contains bits to enable interrupt for ADC and DAC tiles.
This register contains bits to enable interrupt for blocks.
This register contains bits to enable different interrupts for block X.
This register contains bits to configure multiband.
This register contains bits to configure Invsinc.
This register contains bits to configure Invsinc.
This register contains bits to configure Signal Detector.
This register contains the bits to control the clock divider providing the clock fabric out.
This register contains bits to configure multiband for DAC.
Multi-Tile Sync bit masks.
This register contains bits to configure output divisor

sectiondef.header: Multi-tile sync and clock source control register

description.para: This register contains bits to Multi-tile sync and clock source control
This register contains bits for VCO sel_auto, VCO band selection etc.,
This register contains bits for delaying the FIFOs.,
This register contains the data scaler ebable bit.
This register contains the calibration divider bypass enable bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to the target register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u32 XRFdc_ReadReg64(XRFdc *InstancePtr. u32 BaseAddress, s32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to target register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XRFdc_WriteReg64(XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddress, s32 RegOffset, u64 RegisterValue)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to the target register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u32 XRFdc_ReadReg(XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddress. int RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to target register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XRFdc_WriteReg(XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddress, int RegOffset, u32 RegisterValue)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to the target register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u16 XRFdc_ReadReg16(XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddress. int RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to target register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XRFdc_WriteReg16(XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddress, int RegOffset, u16 RegisterValue)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to the target register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u8 XRFdc_ReadReg8(XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddress. int RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to target register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XRFdc_WriteReg8(XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 BaseAddress, int RegOffset, u8 RegisterValue)
